title: Health Game Advice Splash Screen
description: Bringing China's Healthy Game Advice to MC Java Edition
body:
> ⚠️IMPORTANT: REQUIRE [PUZZLE](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle) OR OPTIFINE TO WORK! ![Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cvNLrX9k/images/83b146ae54440e49cf04bfaa8f041486a8452a23.png) ## Bringing Healthy Game Advice to Minecraft Java Edition Splash Screen! **It's a project for fun and may not update often.** This advice was issued by State Administration of Press, Publication, Radio, Film and Televison of The P.R.C. and National Health Commission of the P.P.C. on September 20, 2003 and requires all game publications sold in China to carry the full text of the advice in a conspicuous place, and any game publication that fails to carry the advice will be prohibited from publishing, selling, etc. [Minecraft China Edition](https://minecraft.wiki/w/China_Edition) also follows the requirement to display the content on the game launcher. ## It's all in Chinese. I want the advice in English. Boycott bad games and reject pirated games._(抵制不良游戏，拒绝盗版游戏。)_
Pay attention to self-protection and beware of being cheated._(注意自我保护，谨防受骗上当。)_
Moderate games are good for the brain, addicted games hurt the body._(适度游戏益脑，沉迷游戏伤身。)_
Reasonable arrangement of time, enjoy a healthy life._(合理安排时间，享受健康生活。)_ ## About the Copyright. - **Mojang Studios** is a registered trademark of Microsoft Corporation. - **Healthy Game Advice** is in the public domain (according to P.R.C.'s copyright law). - The font used in the splash screen is **Noto Sans SC**, which licensed under `SIL Open Font License 1.1`. - This resource pack is licensed under the `CC0 1.0 Universal` (public domain).
